task_summaries.task_scope: Compare variance ratios and unique value counts of key features across multiple defined time windows to detect structural variation stability.
Test consistency of class-conditioned distribution differences under varying network conditions using distribution and local consistency verification.
Evaluate potential sampling biases by cross-referencing structural variation features with capture metadata and duplication checks.
Assess alignment of observed structural variations with known DDoS behavioral signatures using structural summary and shortcut verification.
